# Brand DNA — schema for _context/brand-style.md
# Adapted from ItsssssJack/power-design (MIT)
#
# This is the per-project machine-readable brand spec. Every project copies this template
# into `_context/brand-style.md` (typically auto-generated by /init-project from onboarding answers)
# and fills in real values. The designer agent and all production skills read both
# `_context/style-guide.md` (human prose context) AND this file (token spec).
#
# Replace ALL <PLACEHOLDER> values. Delete fields that don't apply.
---

# Brand DNA — <BRAND NAME>

**Source URL:** <https://example.com>
**Last updated:** <YYYY-MM-DD>
**Project type:** <personal-brand | saas-app | publisher | ai-agent-persona | media-brand>

---

## Colors (60-30-10 roles)

The 60-30-10 split governs every artifact: 60% dominant, 30% secondary, 10% accent.

| Role | Hex | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| **Dominant (60%)** | `<#XXXXXX>` | Primary background. Most surface area on every canvas. |
| **Secondary (30%)** | `<#XXXXXX>` | Body text, secondary surfaces, supporting elements. |
| **Accent (10%)** | `<#XXXXXX>` | The one thing the eye lands on. CTAs, key data, focal moments. |

### Extended palette (optional, only if used in production)

| Token | Hex | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| `<token-name>` | `<#XXXXXX>` | <one-line usage> |

### Color harmony scheme

One of: monochromatic / analogous / complementary / split-complementary / triadic. Pick one and never mix.

**Chosen scheme:** `<scheme>`

---

## Typography

### Type stack

| Role | Family | Weights used | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Display / headline | `<font-family>` | `<weights, e.g., 700>` | <use case> |
| Body | `<font-family>` | `<weights, e.g., 400, 600>` | <use case> |
| Accent / quote (optional) | `<font-family>` | `<weights>` | <use case> |

Maximum 2 typefaces in production (display + body). Optional accent for pull quotes only.

### Modular type scale

Choose ONE ratio and derive all sizes from a base. Workspace default: **1.333 with base 20 px → 20, 28, 36, 48, 64, 84, 112**.

**Chosen ratio:** `<1.25 | 1.333 | 1.414 | 1.5 | 1.618>`
**Base size:** `<20 px>`
**Derived scale (rounded to 8-pt friendly):** `<20, 28, 36, 48, 64, 84, 112>`

Maximum 4 sizes per canvas; maximum 6 across a deck/page.

### Web reference scale (when artifact is HTML)

| Role | Size | Line-height |
|---|---|---|
| H1 / hero | `<48–64 px>` | `1.05–1.2` |
| H2 | `<32–40 px>` | `1.2–1.3` |
| H3 | `<20–24 px>` | `1.25–1.4` |
| Body | `<16–18 px>` | `1.5–1.6` |
| Caption | `<12–14 px>` | `1.4` |

---

## Spacing & grid

- **Base unit:** 8 px
- **Allowed values:** 4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 40, 48, 64, 80, 96, 128, 160, 192, 256
- **Container max-width (web):** `<1400 px>`
- **Default side padding (web):** `<32 px>`
- **Slide reference:** 1920×1080 with 96 px outer margin, 12-col grid, 24–32 px gutters
- **Social square:** 1080×1080 with 54 px safe-zone
- **OG image:** 1200×630 with 60 px wide / 32 px tall safe-zone

---

## Logo

- **File path / SVG:** `<relative path or inline SVG>`
- **Light-background variant:** `<path>`
- **Dark-background variant:** `<path>`
- **Minimum size:** `<24 px tall>`
- **Default placement:** `<bottom-left, ~24 px tall, inside the 5% safe-zone>`
- **Clear-zone:** `<≥1 cap-height all sides>`

---

## Default mode

The default mode for ambiguous briefs. The 4 valid modes:

- **presenter** — slides for live talks, ≤25 words/slide, image-led
- **document** — decks sent as PDFs, ≤75 words/slide, hierarchical
- **hero** — landing-page heroes, OG images, ad creatives — ≤10 words, image- or typographic-led
- **data-dense** — carousels (slide 2+), infographics, document pages — ≤75 words, structured

**Default:** `<one of the four>`

---

## Voice tokens (link, don't duplicate)

Voice and tone live in `_context/brand-voice.md`. Reference here only the on-canvas-text rules:

- **Banned characters:** em dashes (—). Use periods or commas.
- **Banned phrases:** see `_context/brand-voice.md`.
- **Headline tone:** `<analytical / playful / declarative / etc.>`
- **CTA voice:** `<one or two sentences>`

---

## Component primitives

Reference `_context/style-guide.md` for the prose explanation. Token specs:

### Button (CTA)

```
background: <accent hex>
color: <on-accent hex>
font: <display family>, 600
padding: 12px 24px (or 0.65" × 3.0" for slide CTA)
radius: 8 px
shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)
```

### Card

```
background: <secondary surface hex>
border-left: 4–5 px solid <accent hex>  # if used
padding: 32 px (web) / 0.5" (slide)
gap-between-cards: 24 px (web) / 32 px (slide)
```

### Accent bar

```
height: 4–6 px
color: <accent hex>
position: top of card OR left of section
```

---

## Anti-pattern list (project-specific overrides)

Things this brand specifically bans, even if not in the universal anti-AI-slop list:

- `<example: never use red as accent — reserved for error states>`
- `<example: no italic body text — display only>`
- `<example: ban photo backgrounds on social graphics>`
